results.title: Seedance 2 Fast - AI Model | Layer
excerpts:
Section Title: Seedance 2 Fast
Content:
**Seedance 2 Fast** is the accelerated variant of [ByteDance's](https://seed.bytedance.com/en/seedance) Seedance 2 video generation model, optimized for faster turnaround without sacrificing core quality. It supports text-to-video and image-to-video generation with first/last frame control, 720p resolution, and native audio generation — all at a lower cost per generation than the standard Seedance 2 model.
[Get started with Seedance 2 Fast](https://app.layer.ai/me/session/new?mode=CREATE_VIDEO&styleId=cac96ebb-f0aa-4724-b7f3-0c9590d682ef)
Section Title: Seedance 2 Fast > Create amazing video content with Seedance 2 Fast on Layer
Content:
The complete content creation platform for modern game teams. From concepting to polished in-game assets
- across Image, 3D, Video, and Audio.

results.title: Seedance 2.0
excerpts:

Content:
Join thousands of creators using Seedance 2 for multi-modal video generation with universal reference, built-in audio, and one-take continuity. Your next masterpiece starts here.
Try Seedance 2 Free Seedance 2 Guide
Seedance 2 is a multi-modal AI video generation platform, powered by ByteDance's latest technology. Create cinematic videos by uploading images, videos, and audio as references — with @ syntax for precise control. Built-in sound design, one-take continuity, video editing, and camera replication. Plus access AI image generation and music creation tools.

results.title: Atlas Cloud Makes Seedance 2.0 Available to Global Developers -- Transparent Per-Second Pricing, No Waitlist
excerpts:
Section Title: Atlas Cloud Makes Seedance 2.0 Available to Global Developers -- Transparent Per-Second Pricing, ...
Content:
Atlas Cloud's [Seedance 2.0 API](https://www.atlascloud.ai/collections/seedance2) is built for teams that need to ship — predictable billing, stable infrastructure, and access that works from day one.
**Two Models, One Platform**
Atlas Cloud offers two versions of Seedance 2.0, each suited to different production needs:
Seedance 2.0 — $0.127/second
The full-power model. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference video generation. Native audio output included. Best for commercial deliverables, brand campaigns, and any content where output quality is the priority.
Seedance 2.0 Fast — $0.101/second
Built for speed and volume. Supports the same three generation modes with native audio. Best for prototyping, high-volume pipelines, and workflows where iteration speed matters more than maximum fidelity.

results.title: Dreamina Bytedance – AI Video Generator
excerpts:
Section Title: What is Dreamina AI?
Content:
Dreamina is an AI-powered design platform developed by ByteDance. It's designed to help creators like me turn ideas into visuals using text prompts, image editing tools, and collaborative features. Whether you're a digital artist, game designer, marketer, or content creator, Dreamina can help you generate high-quality images quickly.

results.title: TikTok Expands 'Symphony,' Offers AI Video For Brands, Creators 04/15/2026
excerpts:
Section Title: TikTok Expands 'Symphony,' Offers AI Video For Brands, Creators
Content:
by Colin Kirkland , April 14, 2026
TikTok has announced that it has begun integrating
ByteDance's next-generation artificial intelligence (AI) video model into its Symphony suite for advertisers, expanding [video-script generation](https://www.mediapost.com/publications/article/404557/tiktok-expands-smart-catalog-ads-and-more.html) to actual branded video automation for in-app promotions.
“Dreamina” -- the latest Seedance 2.0 video model from TikTok’s parent company -- is designed to generate realistic-appearing depictions based on text prompts, images and
reference clips entered by advertisers.
According to the company's announcement, the Dreamina model improves the consistency of brands’ products across video segments in attempts to
boost consumer recognition.

What does this mean? As of March 2026, **any third-party platform claiming to offer Seedance 2.0 API services is not using an official interface** . There's only one possible implementation method: reverse-engineering ByteDance's Dreamina web version.
